/usr/bin/ar qc libcodesandbox.a CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/ProcessUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/CMakeFiles/3.25.1/CompilerIdCXX/CMakeCXXCompilerId.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/languageRunners/CRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/languageRunners/CppRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/languageRunners/GoRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/languageRunners/JavaRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/languageRunners/PythonRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/sandboxRuntime/CgroupManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/sandboxRuntime/FilesystemManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/sandboxRuntime/NamespaceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/sandboxRuntime/SandboxRuntime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/sandboxRuntime/SeccompManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/scheduler/ResultCollector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/scheduler/TaskManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/service/SandboxService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/workerPools/CompilerPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/workerPools/SandboxPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/codesandbox.dir/workerPools/SandboxWorkerPool.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcodesandbox.a
